message:
refactor(rch): extract workers_deploy command to dedicated module

Continues modularization of commands by extracting worker deployment:

New workers_deploy.rs (~200 lines):
- workers_deploy_binary command for deploying rch-wkr to workers
- Local binary discovery and version extraction
- Remote version checking via SSH
- SCP-based deployment with sudo fallback
- Dry-run mode support
- JSON output for scripting

Updated mod.rs:
- Removed inline workers_deploy implementation
- Re-exports from new module

config.rs updates:
- Additional config subcommands for worker management
- Config file validation helpers

types.rs additions:
- New types for deployment status tracking

This extraction improves maintainability by isolating the complex
binary deployment logic from the main command dispatcher.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
